meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start building revenue. Learn advanced user onboarding strategies using Antigravity and Claude Code to escape tutorial hell.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell occurs when users consume content without achieving product activation. The solution is 'just-in-time' onboarding: embed interactive, milestone-based prompts directly into your app’s workflow. By using Antigravity for state orchestration and Claude Code for rapid feature iteration, you transform passive observers into active, paying customers.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks perfecting your stack, yet your analytics dashboard is a graveyard of abandoned sessions. Users aren't failing because your product lacks utility; they are failing because they are trapped in a cognitive loop—the dreaded 'tutorial hell'—where they consume documentation instead of realizing value. You are building a SaaS, not a library.

To bridge the gap between registration and revenue, you must replace static guides with an active, guided onboarding flow that forces the 'Aha!' moment within the first 120 seconds. This tutorial provides the architectural blueprint to move from passive instruction to active product activation using modern AI-assisted engineering.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Milestone
steps.description: Identify the single metric that signals a user has found value. We will map this to a state-driven onboarding trigger.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current user flow and identify the friction points preventing a new user from hitting the core value proposition within 2 minutes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file flow_analysis.py --task 'Generate a state machine for the first-run experience based on the user journey map.'

steps.title: Implement Just-in-Time Tooltips
steps.description: Contextual help is superior to documentation. We will inject UI hints that appear only when the user stalls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React-based tooltip component that tracks user inactivity and triggers a contextual hint based on the current DOM state.

steps.title: Automate Interactive Walkthroughs
steps.description: Use AI to generate guided paths that adapt to the user's input, ensuring they reach the first successful output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an adaptive onboarding logic that modifies the UI walkthrough steps based on the user's previous selection in the onboarding form.

steps.title: Integrate Progress Persistence
steps.description: If a user leaves, they must resume exactly where they stopped. We will implement state persistence using your DB.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a database schema and controller to track user onboarding progress steps and resume state across browser sessions.

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion Metrics
steps.description: Add telemetry to track drop-off points in your onboarding flow to iterate on the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement event tracking for each step of the onboarding flow and output a dashboard-ready JSON format for monitoring.

pro_tips: Never force a user to read; make them do. Every onboarding step should require a single, low-friction interaction.
Use 'empty states' as an opportunity to provide a template or a 'one-click start' button rather than a blank screen.
Implement a 'skip' option for power users; forcing onboarding on a developer will cause immediate churn.
Measure 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) as your primary North Star metric during the first week of launch.
Leverage Claude Code to write unit tests for your onboarding flow to ensure that UI changes don't break the critical path.
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is active, deploy the flow to a 10% canary group, monitor the activation rate, and iterate on the copy based on user drop-off telemetry.
content.conversion_block: You have the architecture to stop the churn and start the revenue. Don't let your features go undiscovered. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
